title: Edwards Lifesciences: Seeking 60% Upside For Potential Exit At $160 Per Share
text: Edwards Lifesciences is well positioned to absorb cost headwinds in the medical technology segment. The company's propensity to drive free cash flow below the bottom line has ensured a robust schedule of growth in earnings and equity value.
